creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-07-18 12:35:46 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/py-cclib       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    devel/py-cclib/files patch-setup.py 
  Log:
  Py-cclib is an open source library, written in Python, for parsing and
  interpreting the results of computational chemistry packages. The current
  version, cclib 0.9, parses output files from ADF, GAMESS (US), GAMESS-UK,
  Gaussian, Jaguar, Molpro, ORCA and PC GAMESS.
  
  WWW:  http://cclib.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/125490
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3131    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/devel/py-cclib/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/py-cclib/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +13 -0     ports/devel/py-cclib/files/patch-setup.py (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/py-cclib/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +389 -0    ports/devel/py-cclib/pkg-plist (new)
